mapper.sql: mall_order_info.`id`, mall_order_info.`del_flag`, mall_order_info.`create_time`, mall_order_info.`update_time`, mall_order_info.`user_id`, mall_order_info.`order_no`, mall_order_info.`sales_price`, mall_order_info.`freight_price`, mall_order_info.`payment_way`, mall_order_info.`payment_price`, mall_order_info.`payment_time`, mall_order_info.`delivery_time`, mall_order_info.`receiver_time`, mall_order_info.`closing_time`, mall_order_info.`is_pay`, mall_order_info.`name`, mall_order_info.`status`, mall_order_info.`user_message`, mall_order_info.`transaction_id`, mall_order_info.`logistics_id`, mall_order_info.`remark`

if.if: AND mall_order_info.`is_pay` = '0' AND mall_order_info.`status` is null

choose.when: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM mall_order_item mall_order_item WHERE mall_order_item.`order_id` = mall_order_info.`id` AND ( (mall_order_item.`status` IN ('1', '2', '3') AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '0') OR mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '1' ) )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM mall_order_item mall_order_item WHERE mall_order_item.`order_id` = mall_order_info.`id` AND mall_order_item.`status` = '1' AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '0' )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM mall_order_item mall_order_item WHERE mall_order_item.`order_id` = mall_order_info.`id` AND mall_order_item.`status` = '2' AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '0' )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM mall_order_item mall_order_item WHERE mall_order_item.`order_id` = mall_order_info.`id` AND mall_order_item.`status` = '3' AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '0' )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM mall_order_item mall_order_item WHERE mall_order_item.`order_id` = mall_order_info.`id` AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '1' )

mapper.select: SELECT , mall_user.`user_no`, mall_user.`nick_name` AS `user_nick_name`, mall_user.`real_name` AS `user_real_name`, mall_user.`mobile` AS `user_mobile`, mall_user.`avatar_url` AS `user_avatar_url` FROM mall_order_info mall_order_info LEFT JOIN mall_user mall_user ON mall_user.`id` = mall_order_info.`user_id`

SELECT COUNT(1) AS `totalCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN result_set.`is_pay` = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `paidCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN result_set.`status` = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `waitDeliveryCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN result_set.`has_processing_after_sale` = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `processingAfterSaleCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN result_set.`has_refunded` = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `refundedCount`, COALESCE(SUM(result_set.`payment_price`), 0) AS `paymentAmount` FROM ( SELECT mall_order_info.`id`, mall_order_info.`is_pay`, mall_order_info.`status`, mall_order_info.`payment_price`, COALESCE(after_sale_stat.`has_processing_after_sale`, 0) AS `has_processing_after_sale`, COALESCE(after_sale_stat.`has_refunded`, 0) AS `has_refunded` FROM mall_order_info mall_order_info LEFT JOIN mall_user mall_user ON mall_user.`id` = mall_order_info.`user_id` LEFT JOIN ( SELECT mall_order_item.`order_id`, MAX(CASE WHEN mall_order_item.`status` IN ('1', '3') AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `has_processing_after_sale`, MAX(CASE WHEN mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `has_refunded` FROM mall_order_item mall_order_item WHERE mall_order_item.`del_flag` = '0' GROUP BY mall_order_item.`order_id` ) after_sale_stat ON after_sale_stat.`order_id` = mall_order_info.`id`
) result_set
